title: Surgeries | David Smith MP
meta_description: My team run regular surgeries to support you with practical problems. This could be a dodgy bill, a neighbourhood issue...
text_excerpt: Surgeries | David Smith MP Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Search for: Search Search Surgeries I hold regular surgeries around North Northumberland. These include weekly caseworker surgeries with my team, and regular general surgeries with myself. Find out more or book an appointment below. Upcoming Surgeries General Surgeries MPs regularly hold general surgeries for constituents to come and talk about local matters, national policy, or another subject they would like to discuss with their MP. I really enjoy my general surgeries, which I regularly hold across North Northumberland on Fridays. I also hold some online . These surgeries book up fast, and often months in advance. If you’d like to attend one, please email me directly with what you’d like to discuss and where you’d like to meet me. My team will try to find you an appropriate appointment. MP Surgeries Casework & Casework Surgeries For support with practical matters. 10:00 – 13:00 Morpeth Office: first and third Wednesday of the month Berwick Office: second and fourth Wednesday of the month My team also run regular surgeries at my offices to support you with practical problems . This could be a dodgy bill, a neighbourhood issue, a funding need, or anything else. You can book an appointment by following the event links below or by emailing me directly at david.smith.mp@parliament.uk. Make sure to include your issue/problem, contact information, preferred date, time and location. Please do not attend without an appointment. Caseworker Surgery No event found!
